titleStmt.title: SII 31.105: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 105. (A.R. No. B 294 of 1938.) VELUDURTI, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Chennakēśava svāmi temple.
It is dated in Śaka 1472, Saumya, Āshāḍha, śu. 11, Friday, corresponding to July 5, 1549 A.D. (expired).

Damaged. Registers a gift of a land made by Kūnapuli Immaḍi Basivināyaka to the barber Chennōji, for performing daily Nadhasvaram (dōḷa-nāgasarālu) sevice in the temple of Cheṁnarāya at Veludoruti at the time of dasami mahōstvālu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śālivā
hāna śakavarṣaṁbulu 1472 Agunē
ṭi saumya saṁvvatsara Āṣāḍa śu 11 śu
śrīmadrājāthirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa sadāśivadēvarāya
lu vijayanagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhā
sanārūḍhulai pṛdivī sāṁrājyaṁ
sēyucuṁḍagānu kūnapuli
[I]mmaḍi basivināyanigāru
veludorutinu
ceṁnnarāyani

ki daśami mahā
tsavāla kuṁnnu
nityamuṁ rēpuṁ
nnu māpuṁnnu
ḍōḷanāgasarā
lasēva sēsēnimi
tyaṁ maṁggaḷa ci
ṁmnōjuku pe
ṭṭina mānyaṁ
mūlamaḷa
kaṟa vāricēni
staḷamānyaṁ ve
jana cēnu kha ṁ . 2
paṁnniḍu mu
kolavalli teru
vumaḍi 1
tūmedunnu
taṁmaḷavāri
tōṭa Aṟunnu
ciṁttakōṁ
mmuvāri tō
ṭa tūrpunnu
1) In the AR Ep it is mentioned as Śaka 1471 for Śaka 1472.

staḷālu 2ṭanu tō
ṭa mā māneḍuṁnnu
nīku mānyeṁ veṭatimi
gāsa ceṁnnarāyaniki dō
ḷanāgasarāla sēvasēsi
I cēnuṁnnu maḍiṁnni tō
ṭasu ĀṁcaṁdrārkkastāIgā
su Anubhaviṁpagalavāru .
Ipuṁṇyānaku yavvaru
tappinānu mātrugama
na sahōdaragamanaṁ
sēsina pāpāna bōvu
vārani vrāIṁcci
na śāsanaṁ śrī śrī
śrī .
Digital edition of SII 31.105 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
